revision.comment: Creating this empty+null parameter handling template.
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}
| {{{1}}}
| {{#if:{{{2|}}}
  | {{{2}}}
  | {{#if:{{{3|}}}
    | {{{3}}}
    | {{{4|}}}
    }}
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

<!-- {{pp-template|small=yes}} -->
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: To indicate how I want it.
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}
| {{{1}}}
| {{#if:{{{2|}}}
  | {{{2}}}
  | {{#if:{{{3|}}}
    | {{{3}}}
    | {{{4|}}}
    }}
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

<!-- {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} -->
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected Template:Ifempty [edit=sysop:move=sysop] (expires 00:00, 25 July 2008 (UTC))
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}
| {{{1}}}
| {{#if:{{{2|}}}
  | {{{2}}}
  | {{#if:{{{3|}}}
    | {{{3}}}
    | {{{4|}}}
    }}
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

<!-- {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} -->
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:Ifempty]]": Starting to become fairly widely used (3000 pages), and not likely to need much editing in the future. [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}
| {{{1}}}
| {{#if:{{{2|}}}
  | {{{2}}}
  | {{#if:{{{3|}}}
    | {{{3}}}
    | {{{4|}}}
    }}
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

<!-- {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} -->
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Added "{{pp-template|small=yes}}".
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}
| {{{1}}}
| {{#if:{{{2|}}}
  | {{{2}}}
  | {{#if:{{{3|}}}
    | {{{3}}}
    | {{{4|}}}
    }}
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{pp-template|small=yes}}
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: upgrade to work with up to 9 parameters
Add safe subst
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{ {{{|safesubst:}}} #if:{{{1|}}}
| {{{1}}}
| {{ {{{|safesubst:}}} #if:{{{2|}}}
  | {{{2}}}
  | {{ {{{|safesubst:}}} #if:{{{3|}}}
    | {{{3}}}
    | {{ {{{|safesubst:}}} #if:{{{4|}}}
      | {{{4}}}
      | {{ {{{|safesubst:}}} #if:{{{5|}}}
        | {{{5}}}
        | {{ {{{|safesubst:}}} #if:{{{6|}}}
          | {{{6}}}
          | {{ {{{|safesubst:}}} #if:{{{7|}}}
            | {{{7}}}
            | {{ {{{|safesubst:}}} #if:{{{8|}}}
              | {{{8}}}
              | {{ {{{|safesubst:}}} #if:{{{9|}}}
                | {{{9}}}
                }}
              }}
            }}
          }}
        }}
      }}
    }}
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{pp-template|small=yes}}
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Undid revision 368846878 by [[Special:Contributions/Plastikspork|Plastikspork]] ([[User talk:Plastikspork|talk]])
Try adding safesubst again, this time without extra spacing
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{1|}}}
| {{{1}}}
| {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{2|}}}
  | {{{2}}}
  | {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{3|}}}
    | {{{3}}}
    | {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{4|}}}
      | {{{4}}}
      | {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{5|}}}
        | {{{5}}}
        | {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{6|}}}
          | {{{6}}}
          | {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{7|}}}
            | {{{7}}}
            | {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{8|}}}
              | {{{8}}}
              | {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{9|}}}
                | {{{9}}}
                }}
              }}
            }}
          }}
        }}
      }}
    }}
  }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{pp-template|small=yes}}
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: remove {{pp-template}}
Anthony Appleyard moved page [[Template:Ifempty]] to [[Template:If empty]]: Requested at [[WP:RM]] as uncontroversial ([[Special:Permalink/616321306|permalink]])
use Lua per protected edit request
make this substable
Changed protection level for "[[Template:If empty]]": matching module permission ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

Changed protection settings for "[[Template:If empty]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: used on 2 million pages and permanently cascade protected; matches module protection ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:If_empty]]

Changed protection settings for "[[Template:If empty]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: used on 2 million pages and permanently cascade protected; matches module protection ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))

Changed protection settings for "[[Template:If empty]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: used on 2 million pages and permanently cascade protected; matches module protection ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported: I hope this actually fixes things
14 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:If_empty]]
Bot: redirect unused template to en:

Changed protection settings for "[[Template:If empty]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: used on 2 million pages and permanently cascade protected; matches module protection ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:50:55 on [[Template:If empty]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
